svg.title: RAG Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Two-lane diagram: Upload pipeline (top) and Query pipeline (bottom) showing a full RAG system with FastAPI, FAISS, MiniLM, and Groq LLaMA3.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does FastAPI do in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is the background job doing?')
sendPrompt('How is text extracted from the uploaded file?')
sendPrompt('What is MiniLM and why use it for embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How does a FAISS index work?')
sendPrompt('What does the user send in the query?')
sendPrompt('What does FastAPI do in the query flow?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS search return the top 5 results?')
sendPrompt('What does Groq LLaMA3 do with the retrieved chunks?')
sendPrompt('What does the final response include?')
